title: Vegetable Poached Delight in a Croatian Bowl
description: A hearty and healthy meal featuring poached vegetables, served in a traditional Croatian bowl with a pleasant twist.
instructions: 1. Fill a large pot with water and bring to a boil.
2. Add the carrots, potatoes, and zucchini to the pot and poach for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
3. In a separate pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add the onions and garlic to the pan and sauté for 3-4 minutes, or until softened.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve the poached vegetables in a traditional Croatian bowl, topped with the onion and garlic mixture.
7. Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
9. Note: You can also add some chopped fresh parsley or dill on top for extra flavor and color.
10. This dish is best served hot, so be sure to poach the vegetables just before serving.
